I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, possessing a strong foundation in medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I have excellent interpersonal skills, a strong team spirit, and a commitment to continuous learning and skill development. I am reliable, dependable, and proactive in seeking new responsibilities within diverse employment contexts. I excel at managing multiple tasks, supervising teams, and delivering high-quality work that contributes to organizational success.  

Experience includes roles as a medical scribe and editor, supervisor, and customer relationship executive in the glass industry, with a focus on quality control, process optimization, and customer service. I have held positions such as quality analyst, quality controller/editor, and editor in medical transcription, consistently demonstrating accuracy, speed, and adherence to turnaround times.  

I am passionate about my work, adaptable, and proficient in tools such as Word, Excel, Outlook, and electronic health records. I am a positive, energetic, and leadership-oriented professional with a strong commitment to excellence in medical transcription and customer service.  

Nationality: Indian | Visa: On Visit.
